meaning: n.槌球戏,循环球戏vi.击自己的球使其撞打对方的球
examples: Do you play croquet with the Queen to-day?
For the Duchess. An invitation from the Queen to play croquet.
"I must go and get ready to play croquet with the Queen," and she hurried out of the room.
Called Croquet, it runs on top of operating systems like Windows, Linux and Apple.
This spring the universities of Minnesota and Wisconsin will try Croquet for collaborative classroom labs.
